arts.ttl: ‘Shameful’: Rome mayor dismayed after Lazio thugs attack Real Sociedad fans
arts.sum: Nine supporters injured before Europa League tie Victims set upon with clubs, chains, knives and hammers Nine Real Sociedad football fans were injured, one seriously, in central Rome late on Wednesday night, allegedly after being violently attacked by hardcore “ultra” Lazio supporters. According to reports in Italian media, the Spanish fans were among a group of about 70 allegedly set upon by what appeared to be about 80 Lazio ultras, who were armed with clubs, chains and knives and hammers, outside a pub on Via Leonina in the Monti district of the Italian capital. Security in the city has been upped before the Europa League match at Rome’s Stadio Olimpico on Thursday night. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer exclusive: Update on £51m Martin Zubimendi move as Declan Rice hint dropped
arts.sum: Martin Zubimendi to Arsenal is not a done deal just yet, but there is a "good chance" that a transfer will go through, Charles Watts tells Sports Mole.

arts.ttl: Europa League | Lazio v Real Sociedad: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: Lazio face a mixed bag of player availability as they prepare for their upcoming Europa League clash with Real Sociedad. The team's defensive options are limited, with Patric and Manuel Lazzari joining Matias Vecino on the injury list. However, there's a silver lining as Loum Tchaouna returns from a domestic suspension, providing a boost to the squad. arts.sum: At the Stadio Olimpico in Rome, Lazio will host Real Sociedad in the penultimate matchday of the Europa League group stage. The contest kicks off on Thursday at 21:00 local time. arts.ttl: Lazio & Torino Still Struggling To Find an Accord With Chelsea
arts.sum: Lazio and Torino are still vying for the signature of Cesare Casadei but neither side has managed to secure an agreement with Chelsea. The Biancocelesti have identified the 22-year-old as their priority target to bolster the middle of the park in January, while Jacopo Fazzini and Reda Belahyane remain the alternative options. arts.ttl: Chelsea Hold Firm as Lazio and Torino Battle for Cesare Casadei
arts.sum: The transfer saga surrounding Cesare Casadei continues to intensify, with Chelsea maintaining a resolute stance on the young midfielder's potential departure. Gianluca Di Marzio reports that despite aggressive approaches from Lazio and Torino, the London club remains unmoved by the current transfer offers.
